scripts.dev: concurrently --names home,blog,counter "yarn workspace @example/home run dev" "yarn workspace @example/blog run dev" "yarn workspace @example/counter run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently --names home,blog,counter "yarn workspace @example/home run start" "yarn workspace @example/blog run start" "yarn workspace @example/counter run start"
scripts.proxy: yarn nextjs-microfrontends proxy --local-apps home blog counter --port 4000
